criteria_results.description: Serwis `db` w docker-compose.yml posiada blok `healthcheck` z kluczami `test`, `interval`, `timeout`, `retries`; `test` wywołuje `pg_isready`
criteria_results.evidence: docker-compose.yml lines 15-20: healthcheck block includes test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready ..."], interval, timeout, and retries.
docker-compose.yml lines 35-37: depends_on.db specifies condition: service_healthy.

criteria_results.description: `drizzle-kit` widnieje w sekcji `dependencies` (nie tylko `devDependencies`) w package.json
criteria_results.evidence: package.json line 73: "drizzle-kit": "^0.31.4" is present in the dependencies object.

criteria_results.description: `drizzle-kit` NIE istnieje już w sekcji `devDependencies` w package.json
criteria_results.evidence: package.json devDependencies block (lines 114-135) does not contain "drizzle-kit".
